c.d: The total number of movies and TV shows available on the platform.
The number of exclusive movies and TV shows produced by the platform.
The monthly fee required to access the platform's content.
Whether the platform offers free content with advertisements.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, smart TVs, streaming devices) that support the platform.
The ease of navigation and overall user experience of the platform's interface.
The maximum video resolution and audio quality offered by the platform.
Availability of downloading content for offline viewing.
The countries or regions where the platform is accessible.
The quality and relevance of content recommendations provided to users.
